rationale: All acceptance criteria were satisfied by a prior successful execution of this bead.

Commit 026b70b "feat(ui): gate schemas-tab Activate on matrix dry-run hash [axon-07430e8f]"
was merged into master at 45cdfa6 during execution 20260507T002932-4b5b9710.

Evidence that every AC is met in the current HEAD:

1. policyActivateDisabled in ui/src/routes/tenants/[tenant]/databases/[database]/schemas/+page.svelte
   (lines 87-95) gates on matrixDryRunHash !== null && matrixDryRunHash === currentPolicyHash.
   Editing the policy textarea nullifies matrixDryRunHash (line 780).

2. ui/tests/e2e/policy-authoring.spec.ts lines 481-528 contain the test
   "matrix dry-run gate: activation blocked until fixture dry-run recorded; editing policy
   invalidates gate", covering all three AC scenarios.

3. ui/src/lib/policy-hash.ts implements computeAccessControlHash (sorted keys, no whitespace,
   SHA-256 first 16 hex chars).

4. ui/src/lib/policy-hash.test.ts contains 7 unit tests that all pass via bun test.
